message: Jake
Yuriko
homeless person
Hey, Boss.
I know it's a bit late to say this, but Eva used to go to Columbus Street, right?
Yeah, that’s right.
So, that means we're getting closer to the core of this, right?
Oh, I'm sure that's the case.
Don.
Ouch!
Ouch.
Ow, ow, ow!
It’s me who's hurt! I think I broke three bones!
Ouch!
What are you talking about? You bumped into me, right?
That’s not true. Hey, didn’t you see it, brother?
Well, I can't tell who bumped into who.
What the hell? Brother, you're on her side. Tch, I’m just.
Left behind by Tsuki.
Boss, let’s ignore this and move on quickly.
That’s just a horrible thing to say!
I’m hurt. I’m going to sue for damages.
What’s with this guy?
Boss, let’s go fast.
Uh, yeah.
No way, I can't let you go. I won’t move an inch until I feel better.
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
System.
The situation around.
About the Decoy House.
Save
Exit the game.
Columbus Street is located in the Upper West. It has stylish shops lined up, and is also a high-class residential area, but
in this area,
as can be seen with those loitering around, it’s a bit of an offbeat back alley, so the scenery can't be said to be nice.
It's rare to see so few people around here.
It's a picture-perfect homeless person. No, actually, he might be much younger than me.
He’s probably making a living by complaining like this and getting a bit of money.
Ora's heart is deeply wounded. If I don't get a decent amount of cash, I won't be able to live on.
Then why don’t you just die? We're in a hurry.
You shouldn’t say things like that.
Are you trying to trample on my human rights, little lady? I’ve decided; I’ll stand here like a wall.
I've decided not to move from here.
I really am in a hurry. How much in compensation should I pay?
Just as I thought, big brother understands.
Hey, Boss, let’s not get caught up with this and move on. Ash is waiting at the Decoy House.
Do you guys have business at the Decoy House?
Ah, that's right.
Oh really?
Well, that sounds serious.
Heh heh heh.
What’s with that creepy vibe?
If you don't listen to my story, you won't be able to sleep at night. Is that okay, is that okay?
Hehehe.
I know a lot more, but I’m bored now, so I’m going home. Goodbye!
Boss, you just wasted unexpected time getting involved with that fool, didn't you? Let's hurry up.
You said going to the Decoy House would be a big deal.
What exactly do you mean by that?
Hehehe.
I won't teach you for free.
Boss, it's just a made-up story because he wants money. Let's ignore him and hurry up.
But...
Hehe, is that okay?
If you don't listen to my story, don't come crying to me later.
You wanna know? You wanna know?
What kind of story is it?
I won't tell you without payment.
Boss.
Then how about you pay me a dollar upfront?
Just a dollar? Well, whatever. Bad luck comes to those who go to the Decoy House.
See, that was a fool's errand, wasn't it?
So, how about I collect 9 dollars? That information is worth 10 dollars.
I know a lot of things.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
